source.multipart_basis: Decomposition inferred from the original prompt; no rulebook citations added beyond those carried by the original sample.

full_prompt: Design the primary pressure shell of the crew living-quarters module of a lunar-surface habitat as a multi-part welded aluminum pressure vessel for a space-design tender-response benchmark. Internal volume 100 m^3, outer diameter 4.5 m, cylindrical length 5.5 m, total length including endcaps 9.0 m. The assembly consists of the cylindrical barrel (longitudinally welded aluminum plate), a forward hemispherical endcap, an aft hemispherical endcap, a structural barrel-to-endcap weld ring on each end, and internal stiffener ring frames distributed along the cylindrical length. Material is Aluminum 2219-T87 (Young's modulus 73 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 352 MPa, ultimate 455 MPa, density 2840 kg/m^3). Shell wall nominal thickness 6 mm; endcap nominal thickness 5 mm. Maximum Expected Operating Pressure (MEOP) is 101.325 kPa (one atmosphere) internal with zero external on the lunar surface. Following ANSI/AIAA S-080A-2018 metallic pressure vessel rules and ECSS-E-ST-32-02C Rev.2, design factors are: proof = 1.5 x MEOP = 152 kPa, burst (non-hazardous crewed) = 2.0 x MEOP = 203 kPa, yield FoS = 1.25, ultimate FoS = 1.4. Load cases: (LC1) internal pressure at MEOP 101.325 kPa; (LC2) proof pressure 152 kPa; (LC3) burst pressure 203 kPa must not produce ultimate failure; (LC4) seismic - lunar moonquake 0.1 g horizontal baseline; (LC5) thermal: outer-skin swing -170 C (shadow) to +120 C (sun) with internal held at 22 C; gradient across 6 mm wall applied as 1D thermal analysis. Pass/fail: (R1) yield FoS 1.25 on LC1 means max von Mises <= 281 MPa; (R2) ultimate FoS 1.4 on LC1 means max stress <= 325 MPa; (R3) under LC3 burst, no ultimate violation (stress <= 455 MPa); (R4) shell + endcap total mass must stay below 4500 kg; (R5) linear buckling eigenvalue under external-pressure 20 kPa fault-case must exceed 2.0. Verification is performed on the assembled multi-body pressure-vessel model with circumferential / longitudinal welds represented as continuous material plus nominal weld heat-affected zone reduction; per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail. Deliverables: STEP AP242 with all bodies, pressure-vessel FEA across LC1-LC3 on assembly, thermal FEA, modal for first 5 axial + ovalization modes, buckling eigenvalue, and a mass + wall-thickness map.
short_prompt:
Design the primary pressure shell of the crew living-quarters module of a lunar-surface habitat as a multi-part welded aluminum pressure vessel.

Internal volume 100 m^3, outer diameter 4.5 m, cylindrical length 5.5 m, total length (with endcaps) 9.0 m. Material Aluminum 2219-T87 (E 73 GPa, Poisson 0.33, yield 352 MPa, ultimate 455 MPa, density 2840 kg/m^3), shell nominal 6 mm, endcap 5 mm. MEOP 101.325 kPa internal, lunar external 0 kPa. Design to ANSI/AIAA S-080A-2018 and ECSS-E-ST-32-02C Rev.2 with yield FoS 1.25, ultimate FoS 1.4, proof 1.5x MEOP, burst 2.0x MEOP.

Load cases.
- LC1 MEOP 101.325 kPa internal.
- LC2 proof 152 kPa.
- LC3 burst 203 kPa (no ultimate failure).
- LC4 seismic lunar moonquake 0.1 g horizontal baseline.
- LC5 thermal: outer skin -170 C to +120 C, interior held at 22 C, across the 6 mm wall.

Shell + endcap mass below 4500 kg; buckling eigenvalue at 20 kPa external fault case > 2.0.

prompt.title: Lunar habitat crew-quarters pressure shell (multi-part welded assembly)
prompt.brief: 2219-T87 Al pressure shell, 4.5 m OD x 9 m L, split into barrel + two hemispherical endcaps + weld rings + internal stiffener rings, compliant with AIAA S-080A and ECSS-E-ST-32-02C.

parts.name: cylindrical_barrel
parts.role: cylindrical pressure-carrying section between the two endcaps

parts.name: forward_hemispherical_endcap
parts.role: forward hemispherical endcap welded to the barrel

parts.name: aft_hemispherical_endcap
parts.role: aft hemispherical endcap welded to the barrel

parts.name: barrel_to_endcap_weld_ring
parts.role: heavier-section weld ring at each barrel/endcap circumferential weld joint

parts.name: internal_stiffener_ring
parts.role: internal ring frame resisting ovalization and external-pressure buckling fault case

assembly_envelope.overall_bbox: 4.5 m OD x 9.0 m total length
assembly_envelope.coordinate_system: +Z along cylinder axis; origin at geometric center

boundary_conditions.interfaces: barrel and endcaps joined at two circumferential weld rings with representative HAZ property reduction; internal stiffener rings tied to barrel inner surface
boundary_conditions.support: module rests on lunar-surface cradle supports, treated as distributed reactions over the aft endcap and aft barrel
boundary_conditions.fastener_stiffness: welded joints modelled as continuous material; bolted stiffener attachments modelled with representative bolt stiffness

prompt.objective: minimize mass while meeting yield, ultimate, burst, and buckling criteria

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: Generated coverage gate: ensures prompt-level envelope, body-count, report-field, and part geometry constraints are represented by an explicit geometry audit experiment.
Generated coverage gate: ensures the declared load case is present in the CCX deck and checked from model.dat.
Generated coverage gate: ensures the declared load case is present in the CCX deck and checked from model.dat.

interfaces.load_path: hoop + longitudinal pressure load across forward barrel/endcap circumferential weld
hoop + longitudinal pressure load across aft barrel/endcap circumferential weld
weld ring reinforcement at barrel/endcap joint
internal stiffener ring resisting ovalization / external-pressure fault

fem_check_policy.rationale: Multipart entries are verified on the assembled model. Per-part stress is reported but does not gate pass/fail.

notes.why_multi_part: Large crewed pressure vessels are fabricated as a cylindrical barrel welded to two hemispherical endcaps with weld rings and internal stiffeners; the pressure load path crosses multiple weld interfaces that must be explicitly represented.
notes.speculation_caveats: Number of internal stiffener rings is speculative; materials, pressures, and thresholds inherit the original sample verbatim.

generated_eval_coverage.purpose: Add runnable CCX coverage kit for JSON-only multipart prompt.
generated_eval_coverage.note: Generated checks assert solver coverage for every FEA-grade requirement, every declared load case, and prompt-level geometry constraints; they are not a domain-specific certification model.
